phone call <agent_id>: Place an outbound call via an agent. Flags: --from-id <id>, --to <e164>.
phone batch submit: Submit a batch of outbound calls. Required: --agent <id>, --phone-number <phone_number_id>, --recipients <path|->. CSV columns: phone_number,conversation_initiation_client_data (JSON). JSON format: array of objects. Optional: --name, --scheduled-time-unix <unix>. POST /v1/convai/batch-calling/submit.
phone batch list: List batch calls in the workspace. Filters: --page-size, --cursor, --status, --agent-id. GET /v1/convai/batch-calling/workspace.
phone batch show <batch_id>: Show a batch with per-call status (aliases: get). GET /v1/convai/batch-calling/{id}.
phone batch cancel <batch_id>: Cancel a batch. Reversible via `phone batch retry` — no --yes required. POST /v1/convai/batch-calling/{id}/cancel.
phone batch retry <batch_id>: Retry a batch (re-dials failed/pending recipients). POST /v1/convai/batch-calling/{id}/retry.
phone batch delete <batch_id> --yes: Delete a batch (aliases: rm). --yes required (irreversible). DELETE /v1/convai/batch-calling/{id}.
phone whatsapp call: Place an outbound WhatsApp voice call. Required: --agent <id>, --whatsapp-account <id>, --recipient <e164>. POST /v1/convai/whatsapp/outbound-call.
phone whatsapp message: Send a WhatsApp message. Required: --agent <id>, --whatsapp-account <id>, --recipient <e164>. Supply exactly one of --text <str> or --template <name>. POST /v1/convai/whatsapp/outbound-message.
phone whatsapp accounts update <id> --pa: PATCH a WhatsApp account with partial JSON from a file. PATCH /v1/convai/whatsapp-accounts/{id}.
phone whatsapp accounts delete <id> --ye: Delete a WhatsApp account (aliases: rm). --yes required (irreversible). DELETE /v1/convai/whatsapp-accounts/{id}.
